name: 3 Bathroom Remodel
content: Customer to provide all finish materials

lineItems.name: Demo
lineItems.description: For three bathrooms:   - Vanity x3 - Toilet x3 - Tub x3 - Shower surround x3 - Bathroom floor x3  - Light fixtures x3

lineItems.name: Tile: Construct Shower Pan
lineItems.description: Master and 1st floor bathrooms

lineItems.name: Tile: Install Durock Shower Surround
lineItems.description: All 3 bathrooms

lineItems.name: Tile: Waterproof Shower Surround
lineItems.description: Redgard waterproofing All 3 bathrooms

lineItems.name: Tile: Install Tiled Shower Surround
lineItems.description: Does not include any shelves, or benches.  If desired will require a change order at additional cost  All 3 bathrooms  Customer to provide tile and grout  Large format tile 12" x 24".  If tile format is substantially different will require change order at additional cost

lineItems.name: Tile: Shower Niche
lineItems.description: Install three standard sized shower niches, one in each bathroom

lineItems.name: Tile: Install Mosaic Tiled Shower Floor
lineItems.description: 2 bathrooms  Customer to provide tile and grout

lineItems.name: Plumbing: Rough Connection for Shower Drain
lineItems.description: 1st floor and master bathroom showers Adjust tub drain connection to shower connection

lineItems.name: Plumbing: Install New Tub
lineItems.description: Customer to provide tub Upstairs bathroom Will use existing rough plumbing connections If rough plumbing needs substantial adjustments from different sized tub or needed reconfigurations will require change order at additional cost

lineItems.name: Plumbing: Install new Shower Fixture
lineItems.description: All 3 bathrooms Customer to provide shower fixtures  Single mixer valve.  If dual diverter is selected by client will require a change order at additional cost

lineItems.name: Tile: Install Durock Sub Floor
lineItems.description: All 3 bathrooms

lineItems.name: Tile: Install and grout new Tile Floor
lineItems.description: All 3 bathrooms Customer to provide tile and grout  Large format 12" x 24" or 12" x 12" tile.  If smaller or more complicated format or placement desired by customer, will require a change order at additional cost

lineItems.name: Carpentry: Install New Vanity
lineItems.description: Single bowl vanities 1st and 3rd floor Customer to provide vanity  Max vanity size is 36" If larger vanity selected will require change order at additional cost

lineItems.name: Carpentry: Install Double Vanity
lineItems.description: Master bath Customer to provide vanity

lineItems.name: Plumbing: Bathroom Sink Faucet Install
lineItems.description: Using existing plumbing If new rough plumbing is required, will require a change order Customer to provide faucet  All 3 bathrooms (x2 for master bathroom double vanity)

lineItems.name: Plumbing: Toilet Install
lineItems.description: All 3 bathrooms Customer to provide toilets

lineItems.name: Carpentry: Install Baseboard Trim
lineItems.description: All 3 bathrooms Customer to provide trim

lineItems.name: Electrical: Install New Vanity Light (existing electrical)
lineItems.description: If new wiring or circuit is needed, will require a change order at additional cost  Customer to provide light fixtures all 3 bathrooms

lineItems.name: Interior Painting
lineItems.description: Paint ceilings, wall, trim All 3 bathrooms  Customer to provide paint

lineItems.name: Carpentry: Install New Mirror
lineItems.description: All 3 bathrooms Customer to provide mirror

lineItems.name: Electrical: Replace Bathroom Vent Fan
lineItems.description: Labor only Customer to supply vent fan Existing electrical will be used, if new electrical needs to be run will require a change order at additional cost  Assumes no adjustments needed to ceiling from same size and style of vent fan.  If different size or style is desired will require change order at additional cost  All 3 bathrooms

lineItems.name: Carpentry: Towel Bar Set Install
lineItems.description: All 3 bathrooms Customer to provide towel bar

lineItems.name: Materials
lineItems.description: - contractor bags  - thinset  - Primer  - paint materials (brushes, drop cloths etc) - durock (shower surrounds and floors)   - shower pan  - Redguard  - Rough plumbing materials (copper pipes, fittings) - Fasteners - Drywall patching materials

lineItems.name: Walkup Surcharge
lineItems.description: 3rd Floor Walkup

name: Bathroom Renovation: Shower to Tub
content:
Customer to provide finish materials
Chicago Reno can purchase on customers behalf with reimbursement on final invoice
Does not include niches, shelves, or benches in showers
Does not include glass shower doors which can be added if desired

name: Bathroom Renovation: Tub to Shower
content:
Estimate does not include any changes to vanity or toilet area or existing bathroom floors.  No electrical outside of elimination of jacuzzi tub is included.  Does not include shelving in closet, to align on with customer before providing pricing

Customer to provide all finish materials

Permit fees are not included in this estimate and will be charged at cost to customer with proof of receipt

lineItems.name: Demo
lineItems.description: - Existing jacuzzi tub - Eliminate existing jacuzzi tub power - Existing standup shower, pan, and wall tile - Existing floor tile  - Temporarily remove vanity and toilet to make way for floor tile install

lineItems.name: Tile: Waterproof Shower Surround
lineItems.description: Redguard waterproofing

lineItems.name: Tile: Install Tiled Shower Surround
lineItems.description: Does not include any shelves, or benches.  If desired will require a change order at additional cost  Includes one shower niche Does not include tile or grout, provided by customer

lineItems.name: Tile: Install new Tile Floor
lineItems.description: Does not include tile or grout, provided by customer  Assumes sub floor is in good condition.  If new subfloor needs to be installed, will require a change order at additional cost
